questions.question: What sport is being played and what object does the man slide down the ice?
questions.answer_key: Curling; he slides a curling stone down the ice
questions.rationale: Establishes the sport and primary action of the clip

questions.question: What happens to the man after he releases the curling stone?
questions.answer_key: He loses his balance and falls onto the ice
questions.rationale: Describes the key incident and consequence of his action

questions.question: How do the onlookers react to the man falling?
questions.answer_key: They react with laughter and concern, checking to see if he is okay
questions.rationale: Captures the emotional response and social context of the scene
